title: Consistent Brown Leather
description: Makes all leather related textures use one consistent brown colour palette. This includes items, leather armour, and saddles.
body:
## Consistent Leather This pack makes all leather related textures use one consistent brown colour palette. This includes items, leather armour, and saddles.
Full list of changes
  • Leather Item
  • Leather Armour
  • Leather Horse Armour
  • Books
  • Bundles
  • Enchanted Books
  • Saddle Items
  • Saddles on entities
  • Item Frames
  • Leatherworker Villager garments
  • Piglins and Piglin Brutes
  • Zombified Piglins
### Pack Versions There are two versions of the pack. "[Consistent Brown Leather](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/consistent-leather)" uses a slightly improved colour palette that is similar to the default leather armour colour. "[Consistent Classic Leather](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/consistent-classic-leather)" uses an orange colour palette similar to the original leather armour colour. ### Inspiration This pack was inspired by [Vanilla Tweak's](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) Brown Leather pack. I made some improvements to the leather palette and applied it to more textures, such as villagers, bundles, and leather armour.
